Issue: Add Fréchet Radiomics Distance (FRD) to MONAI metrics
Decision: Implement FRD as in Konz et al. (arXiv:2412.01496)
Rationale: FRD applies the same Fréchet distance formula as FID but to pre-extracted radiomic features, supporting 2D/3D and optional mask conditioning via external feature extraction (e.g., PyRadiomics)
Author: AymanL
Risk: Potential confusion between FRD and FIDMetric due to equivalent implementation; lack of tutorial guidance for radiomic feature extraction and FRD computation

Argument.author: ericspod
Argument.argument: FRD is equivalent to FIDMetric but applied to radiomic values rather than images; a separate class may not be necessary unless a tutorial demonstrates radiomic feature extraction and FRD computation

Argument.author: ericspod
Argument.argument: The docstring states 'The same Fréchet distance formula as in FID is applied to the mean and covariance of these features,' which may imply additional computations beyond FIDMetric

Argument.author: coderabbitai[bot]
Argument.argument: The implementation includes a FrechetRadiomicsDistance Metric class and get_frd_score(y_pred, y) function that compute the Fréchet distance by applying FID logic to radiomic feature vectors
